title: RC4188 What You Should Know About Audits - Canada.ca
content:
## RC4188 What You Should Know About Audits
As part of our regular activities, the Canada Revenue Agency (CRA) selectively audits tax returns and claims for rebates. Our objective is to ensure the fairness and integrity of our self-assessment tax system.

## Ways to access the information
- Read the publication Online format rc4188-e.html PDF rc4188-18e.pdf

### Read the publication
- Online format rc4188-e.html
- Download and listen Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file. E-text (rc4188-18e.txt)
Use your preferred screen reader to listen to the e-text file.
- E-text (rc4188-18e.txt)
- Ask for an alternate format You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail. Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Ask for an alternate format
You can order a digital audio, e-text, braille or large print version of this publication to be sent to you by mail.
- Order alternate formats for persons with disabilities

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
